base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of battle_terrain — a tile from 1997 final fantasy tactics. Isometric battle-maps with height-layers — castle/mountain/river/desert/chapel terrain tiles. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Isometric battle-maps with height-layers — castle/mountain/river/desert/chapel terrain tiles
